title: New Hampshire snuffs out trailblazing state-government bitcoin bond effort
summary: At its last stage for government approval, the state's executive council rejected the bond project 3-2.

title: Grayscale's CFO exits after 7 years with crypto asset manager
summary: Edward McGee stepped down after seven years, months after distribution chief John Hoffman left for Ondo Finance.

title: With SEC fight over, Coinbase's top legal exec Grewal moves on, and others reassigned
summary: Coinbase Chief Legal Officer Paul Grewal will depart the exchange, though he'll continue as an adviser, he said Thursday.

title: Arbitrum jumps 19% benefitting from Robinhood's $568 million onchain trading frenzy
summary: The brokerage's new blockchain is off to a fast start, with memecoin trading boosting activity and revenue flowing back to the Arbitrum ecosystem.

title: Newest version of crypto Clarity Act may drop as soon as next week, sources say
summary: After a long stretch without breakthroughs in the crypto market structure bill, insiders say a new draft may emerge in a final push for late-July action — though it still lacks bipartisan buy-in.
